seoTitle: Ellinjaa vs Ellinthorp — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ellinjaa and Ellinthorp. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ellinjaa and Ellinthorp.
heading: Ellinjaa vs Ellinthorp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ellinjaa, Queensland and Ellinthorp, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ellinjaa has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Ellinthorp (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ellinjaa or Ellinthorp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ellinjaa has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Ellinthorp scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ellinjaa scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Ellinthorp scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ellinjaa or Ellinthorp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ellinjaa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
